backgrounds/images/pixabay-dark-texture-.caption: This image features a textured, dark blue-green surface with subtle brushstroke patterns, giving a rustic and moody aesthetic. It works well as a background for intros, overlays, or moody, contemplative scenes in videos.

This image features a textured, abstract surface with dominant shades of deep blue and black, creating a gritty and somber tone. It would work well in a dramatic, suspenseful, or introspective video scene as a background or transition.

backgrounds/images/pixabay-mountain-land.caption: This image showcases a serene mountain landscape at sunrise, with rugged cliffs, lush greenery, and a blanket of fog covering distant valleys. Dominated by earthy browns, greens, and soft pastel tones in the sky, it exudes a tranquil and majestic mood, perfect for nature scenes, meditative moments, or an introduction to outdoor exploration footage.

This image shows a misty mountain range enveloped in clouds, with dominant cool tones of gray, blue, and subtle earthy browns. The mood is serene and mysterious, ideal for atmospheric or introspective video scenes.

backgrounds/images/pixabay-technology-ab.caption: This image shows a futuristic, symmetrical hallway with sleek geometric designs illuminated by soft white and warm-toned lighting. The mood is modern and mysterious, making it ideal for sci-fi or suspenseful scenes in video edits.

This image features a futuristic, curved ceiling with glowing blue beams against metallic tones, creating a sleek and modern sci-fi atmosphere. It would work well in a technological or space-themed video, emphasizing innovation or exploration.
